use rayon::prelude::*;

// BAD: collect all results then filter sequentially
fn find_large_files(paths: &[PathBuf]) -> Vec<PathBuf> {
    let all_files: Vec<(PathBuf, u64)> = paths.par_iter()
        .map(|path| {
            let metadata = std::fs::metadata(path).unwrap();
            (path.clone(), metadata.len())
        })
        .collect();

    // Sequential filtering after parallel collection
    all_files.into_iter()
        .filter(|(_, size)| *size > 1_000_000)
        .map(|(path, _)| path)
        .collect()
}

fn process_valid_items(items: &[Item]) -> Vec<Output> {
    let all_outputs: Vec<Option<Output>> = items.par_iter()
        .map(|item| {
            if item.is_valid() {
                Some(process(item))
            } else {
                None
            }
        })
        .collect();

    // Sequential filter after parallel map
    all_outputs.into_iter().flatten().collect()
}
